violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the food warmer and the rolling racks that are holding clean dishes need to be cleaned--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The fronts of the pizza reach in cooler needs to be cleaned.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employees bike was being stored with clean utensils and dishes as well as an employees sweatshirt hanging on the rack with clean pizza dough pans.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Gasket on the reach in freezer needs to be repaired or replaced.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Tall reach-in cooler floor and reach-in freezer need to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Rack holding containers in the dish pit needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The walk-in freezer floor, floors in dry storage and the floor by the bag and box pop area needs to be cleaned.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Spray bottle hanging in dish pit containing blue liquid was not label.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
